name: PNB Housing Finance Limited
summary: PNB Housing Finance Limited operates as a housing finance company in India. The company offers housing loans for the purchase, construction, repair, and renovation of houses/ flats/commercial properties, etc.; loans for commercial spaces; loans against property; loans for purchase of residential plots; loans for purchase, construction, and extension of dwelling units; home loans for nonresident Indians and persons of Indian origin; Unnati home loans; and credit linked subsidy scheme for economical weaker section, and lower and middle income groups. It also provides non home loans, including loans for purchase/construction of commercial properties, residential/commercial immovable property mortgage loans, lease rental discounting loans, and loans for real estate developers. In addition, the company offers fixed deposits. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in New Delhi, India.
